title: various fixes for varlink endpoints
body:
when using build, require a "more" connection to get logs.

when pulling a non-existent image, do not crash varlink connection.

Fixes: #3714
Fixes: #3715

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

Changes LGTM. I'm good to land this for 1.5.0 if anyone wants to merge.
